nodes.label:
CannaMax
/ HARK
nodes.desc: The cultivation OS. Drift detection, change feed, real-time pH/EC/flow per zone. Everything else feeds into this.
nodes.tech: TypeScript · Express 5 · Drizzle · Zod · Alexandria adapters · SQLite
nodes.notes: 2026-05-24: Apply Infinium to All button shipped — one tap snapshots live Infinium readings into all 24 rooms at once. Env timestamps on every tile. Fixed env_readings_source_check DB constraint (infinium-snapshot was missing). Anderson tab live via Fluxuum/facility-tracker integration. 2026-05-29: AB1 chart fix shipped (src/windowing.ts multi-run assignment — fixed empty-chart bug from operator's nested manual catch-runs). 2026-05-30: fluxuum-anderson-drift + lights-on-too-cold detectors both live; main branch caught back up to production via two clean merges. 2026-06-02: dual-backend DB client landed (commit 61ba220) — real PostgreSQL via DATABASE_URL when set, PGlite fallback. Ingredient recon-report updated to reflect 29→13 canonical ingredient cleanup. 2026-06-12+: mark-harvested handler now fires harvest-dossier capture fire-and-forget (commit ca1d094), passing the cycle's load date explicitly; harvest events mirrored to Recipe Book on anderson-hub (3572b2b); lights schedule flipped 11:30→11:50 campus-wide (c082fb4). 2026-06-20: public /cannamax funnel hardening — MOUNT-prefix client URLs + nav rewrite so it works under the Tailscale funnel; runoff writes + Infinium capture gated behind the admin password (ca6ad7a, 85ab630), both Pis, deep-verify passed. 2026-06-26: runoff-loader taught to parse // DATE / // AM / // PM tokens, group multi-day lines per room, and fan every (room,day) row out to Recipe Book at its real sheet date + sheet day — the loader half of the PM runoff backfill pipeline (see PM Runoff Backfill node). 2026-06-28: dashboard CO₂ ramp-down split — AB (56-day) one week ahead of EF/GH (63-day). 2026-06-30: dashboard env targets mirror the CONFIRMED 2026-06-30 flower law (matches FT, clock-current setpoint); both Pis restarted + verified (module cache cleared). 2026-07-07: runoff-loader from-frd taught the 10 veg/mom rooms (rooms 24→34; roomType veg/mom, null active_cycle_id = perpetual) — text-parse ROOM_RE replaced with a VALID_ROOMS set mirroring FRD exactly (34 codes); the 10 rooms seeded into the DB on both Pis (local Postgres 127.0.0.1:5432/cannamax via node --env-file, NOT pglite). Flower unchanged (still 24). Deep-verify PASS both Pis; commit 47695a3.

nodes.label:
Facility
Tracker

nodes.tech: React 18 · Express 5 · PostgreSQL · Claude Vision · pnpm monorepo
nodes.notes: 2026-05-24: Apply Infinium to All button added to INFINIUM tab — fills all 24 room env tiles from live Infinium reads in one tap. 2026-05-30: isLightsOn now per-room — AB2+EF4 on new :50 photoperiod, other 22 rooms still on :30. Same deploy brought D14-42=1150W wattage tier live (after 11 days stale on Pi). 2026-06-28: CO₂ ramp-down split — AB (56-day) steps down one week ahead of EF/GH (63-day). 2026-06-30: CONFIRMED flower env LAW live — real day/night setpoints, dual-track per room; tiles + Anderson table now show the CURRENT setpoint by real clock (not both day/night). One of the 3 synced env homes (FT tile / CannaMax dashboard / recipe-book JSON). Deployed both Pis (master 87736f4).

nodes.label:
Recipe
Book
nodes.desc: Grow recipe hub. Cycle tracking, arc charts, drift detection, field notes. Scrapes live controller data.
nodes.tech: Python · Flask · SQLite · WebSocket · OpenAI (optional)
nodes.notes: 2026-05-30: env program update — photoperiod widened (00:00-11:50 main, +5min UC), D14-42 = 1150W (new tier above 1000W), W7 split (D42 still 1150W, D43 steps down to 1000W). Pi recipe-book is plain-copied files (NOT a git checkout) — edits go via scp + service restart. 2026-06-01-02: HydroZ campus-wide trial complete; Hydro z stub (id=30) consolidated into canonical HydroZ (id=16, GH port 11 / AB port 15 / EF port 16). 29→13 canonical ingredients — Drip A NPK 15-0-0 confirmed, shared name_normalize.py ingester, 9 unit tests. 2026-06-03-04: Drip vendor sheets live for A/B/C/D — ingredient modal restructured into 'Our Program' + 'Vendor Sheet' tabs. 2026-06-04: Day 0 = Load day fixed (removed +1 offset from cycle_day calc). Controller-drift UI removed (room cards + modal banner + 'Actually Running'). Collapsible changelog — day-based grouping, single-open accordion. Deployed to both anderson-hub + hub-backup via redeploy.sh. 2026-06-12: scraper sweep merged (PR #1, TheMaxLong/scraper-sweep-2026-06-12) — hardware relabels + recipe + irrigation snapshots. 2026-06-14: AB7 phantom-runoff purged + guarded (DB trigger guard_runoff_scope); manual.html font deploy + Today's-Panel day off-by-one fix. Recipe Book is treated as a vendor API by downstream tools — READ-ONLY, never migrated. Now also a read source for Observatory + harvest-dossier (runoff reports). 2026-06-25: AB/EF/GH pump-relabel consolidation (broken pumps relabeled, ingredients moved to working ports; library 16→11 canonical cards, Athena Balance #2 retired/hidden) + broken-pump auto-reconcile detector now armed in FacilityCheck (read-only, see broken-pump node). 2026-06-23: program display now reads controller_recipe directly (dropped the +1 shortcut); transition rooms show the loaded program. 2026-06-21: FacilityCheck harvest-forecast off-by-one fixed. 2026-06-24: both-Pi app.py parity drift closed (sha256 904a35d1). 2026-06-26: runoff scope gate WIDENED 12→24 — PM rooms now allowed; a hidden guard_runoff_scope trigger (not in source control) had been silently deleting PM runoff; verified + backed up. 2026-06-28: env_programs document the AB 56-day CO₂ split. 2026-06-29: new harvest LAW per Max's Numbers sheet — AB = 56-day, EF & GH = 63-day (was 55/61) + new FLOWER log format. 2026-06-30: env_programs/anderson_flower_2026-06-30.json committed (confirmed 6-30 flower law). Also gained a new Drench tab (skeleton, branch only — see Drench Library node).

nodes.label:
Fluxuum
Logger
nodes.desc: Irrigation telemetry. pH/EC/flow/gal per zone, 136 reads/hr. Anomaly alerts via Resend email. v5 ESM rewrite (Alexandria-native) is now the sole production poller on anderson-hub (v4.3 stopped 2026-06-04).
nodes.tech: TypeScript · Express 5 · PostgreSQL · React · Resend · OpenAI · pnpm monorepo
nodes.notes: 2026-05-30: v5 Alexandria-native ESM rewrite of poller landed on origin/main (commits 17d8b45 plan, 4673bd9 impl, a8748df heartbeat-fix). 12/12 golden byte-equivalence tests green. 2026-06-04: v4.3 poller stopped + disabled; fluxuum-poller-shadow (v5) is now the sole production poller on anderson-hub. Temp probe Phase 1+2 shipped (branch feature/temp-probe): anderson_probe_readings table created, schema + extractor in source (commit 6645990); DRY_RUN=1 (logs only, no DB writes yet). /api/runs/latest-by-building widget route recovered after it went missing from new bundle (commit ed282b9). /api/anderson-probe/import endpoint in source but old bundle still rolled back — pending new bundle SCP to flip DRY_RUN=0. GET /api/runs/latest-by-building route recovered (commit ed282b9). /api/runs is a rolling ~28-day window — the harvest-dossier archive (archive_runs.py) appends from it into a never-rolling runs.db so long crops survive after the live feed forgets their early weeks.  2026-06-16: AI-prompt cycle-length correction + anderson_probe_readings extractor (phase 1, dry-run).

nodes.label: Alexandria
nodes.desc: Controller adapter abstraction. ObservationOnlyMarker enforces read-only. Supports Anderson, Infinium, TrolMaster, Argus, and more. 2026-05-30: openRunDataStream() added — continuous /rundata/ws streaming for live pollers.
nodes.tech: TypeScript ESM · Zero runtime deps · pnpm monorepo · 5 packages
nodes.notes: 2026-05-30: openRunDataStream() added to adapter-he-anderson — mirrors the existing openPreviousRunStream() pattern (queue/waiters/close handling) but for the LIVE /rundata/ws endpoint (was one-shot fetchRunData only). 7-case test suite covers auth gate, in-order delivery, deferred-arrival waiter, caller-close, server-close, login failure, WS handshake failure. Live smoke green against all 3 facility controllers (AB/EF/GH). Packaged as .tgz for Pi-side install. On origin/main.

nodes.label:
Flower Room
Display
nodes.desc: Daily runoff log OCR. Claude Vision parses handwritten AM log sheets into structured data. The daily-AM app is never touched by the PM backfill clone.
nodes.tech: React 19 · Express 5 · PostgreSQL · Claude Vision (Opus 4.8) · Anthropic SDK
nodes.notes: 2026-06-26: PDF input accepted in the daily runoff app (additive) + upgraded to Opus 4.8. 2026-06-29: OCR runoff parser rewrite — new-format autodetect (new FLOWER sheet drops light-% cols, splits IN→IN PH / IN EC) + RULE B position-based EC (stacked cell TOP=pen / BOTTOM=Solus, read by POSITION not digit-count) + anomaly checker. 2026-06-30: anomaly-check adopted the CONFIRMED 2026-06-30 flower env LAW as its range bands (additive; merge 6166e01a). Deployed both Pis; RULE B proven byte-identical vs the backfill service (deep-verify PASS). 2026-07-06: Veg log sheet added to the daily runoff OCR — single-row veg sheet → :3035. 5 veg rooms EFV1/EFV2/GHV1/GHV2/ABV1 added to VALID_ROOMS, room regex widened [A-Z]{2}→{2,3}; no-IN layout, stations=S1/S2/S3 (VWC + RULE A/B stacked pen/Solus EC), DAY 1=transplant; daily keeps single Temp/Hum/CO2 (no leaf/date). Extraction-only (no DB/cannamax/harvest wiring). Deployed + structurally verified both Pis, deep-verify-eyes PASS; real filled-sheet extraction still Max's to prove. 2026-07-07: mom rooms (ABMOM/EFMOM/GHMOM) + the second AB veg bench (ABV/ABV2, kept distinct) wired into :3035 — VALID_ROOMS 24→34, room regex widened to [A-Z]{2}V + [A-Z]{2}MOM; MOM sheets read like flower (IN + 3 stations). CannaMax from-frd taught the same 10 veg/mom rooms so they persist. Deployed + deep-verify-eyes PASS both Pis. 2026-07-09: DAILY vision model ACTUALLY switched claude-sonnet-4-6 → claude-opus-4-8 (the tech tag had claimed Opus since 6-26 but the live daily call was still sonnet — now real) + incoming upload limit 50mb→256mb (nginx client_max_body_size 100M→300M) so the FULL flower+veg+mom log scans in ONE upload / one try (Max: splitting is unacceptable). Root cause of the old fails: sonnet slipped into prose on big batches → validator dropped rooms; Opus stays format-disciplined. Flower proven byte-clean on Opus (11 pages/one call/26s, no prose-drop) + one-try verified both Pis; branch vision-opus-4.8 merged → add-pdf-input@05785552; rollback dist.bak-sonnet-* per Pi. Confirmed working by Max.

Source mirrored from hub-backup back to git (commit 912818c) — was hand-edited on Pi with no version tracking. Master switch: FACILITY_WATCH=on in /home/pi/cannamax/demo/runoff-loader/.env. Push topic: gacx-power-y2k7q9pmx3. 2026-06-01: lights_out_inferred + lights_on_too_cold stripped from all 24 rooms (CannaMax commit aa7e424). Only high_temp + high_co2 remain active. lights_on_too_cold lives as standalone detector node. 2026-06-19: startFacilityWatch() call restored in server.ts (its absence had broken ALL room temp/CO2 alerts since 6/17); 24 rooms, 90°F/3000ppm, ntfy gacx-power-y2k7q9pmx3 — confirmed live 2026-06-25.

Promote procedure documented in memory. 2026-06-04: v5 fluxuum-poller-shadow code synced from anderson-hub and deployed; new API bundle (feature/temp-probe) deployed; systemd unit installed + daemon reloaded — service not yet enabled+started (session paused before final step). v4 poller service still present. 2026-06-24: app.py / recipe-book parity drift closed — forward-synced anderson-hub→hub-backup, both Pis byte-identical (app.py sha256 904a35d1).  2026-07-01: failover-watcher re-armed after ~1 month silently dead (stale PROMOTED_AT) — ping-OR-http + 20-fail anti-flapping; fail2ban enabled; secrets moved to .hark-secrets; config-snapshot script deployed; now serves Fluxuum web + harvest dossiers (nginx default disabled). facility-health-scanner deployed (12 checks */30 + weekly test-restore Sun 03:00 PT).

nodes.label:
Fluxuum-Anderson
Drift Detector
nodes.desc: Pulls Anderson /previousrun directly (in-memory, no anderson-backfill dependency), compares against fluxuum_runs rows. Emits change_events when Fluxuum's aggregation creates phantom envelope runs, drops tail runs, or drifts >30s from Anderson endpoints. 15-min cron on anderson-hub.
nodes.tech: TypeScript · pure compareRuns() + I/O wrapper · sha256 dedup by [room,kind,15min-bucket]
nodes.notes: Shipped 2026-05-30 ~03:30 PT (178 events in backlog). Cron enabled 2026-05-30 ~08:18 PT. Caught AB1 phantom envelope on 5/28 + 5/29 — same incident the lights-on-too-cold detector caught from a different angle (overnight hallway breaker trip, Lando confirmed).

nodes.label:
Lights-On
Too Cold
nodes.desc: During scheduled lights-on, fires when actual temp is >10F below the recipe-book phase target for >=2 ticks. Catches HVAC failures, breaker trips, sensor faults. Per-room schedule awareness (S1 vs S2; AB2+EF4 on the new :50 photoperiod).
nodes.tech: TypeScript · pure detector + recipe-book phase lookup · change_events writer
nodes.notes: Shipped 2026-05-30 ~03:50 PT (other agent). Fired AB1 03:57:58 PT (66.3F vs 77F D17 W3 target) within hours of going live — same overnight as fluxuum-anderson-drift's AB1 phantom catch. Two orthogonal signals, one physical cause.

nodes.label:
Fluxuum Poller
Shadow (v5)
nodes.desc: v5 Alexandria-native poller — now the sole production poller on anderson-hub (v4.3 stopped 2026-06-04). 'Shadow' in name is legacy from pre-promotion staging. Also deployed to hub-backup (unit installed, not yet started).
nodes.tech: Node 22 ESM · @alexandria/adapter-he-anderson via file:.tgz · systemd unit fluxuum-poller-shadow.service · Pi-side install
nodes.notes: Started 2026-05-30 04:59 PDT as shadow alongside v4. 11/11 byte-identical pairs green. 2026-06-04: v4.3 stopped + disabled; fluxuum-poller-shadow promoted to sole production poller on anderson-hub. Temperature probe extractor runs in DRY_RUN=1 mode (logs readings, no DB writes). hub-backup: code + unit installed (obs 9041, 9045), systemd daemon reloaded, service not yet enabled+started (session paused). Rollback = sudo systemctl start fluxuum-poller (v4.3 code still at /home/pi/fluxuum-poller/).

nodes.label:
Flux Widget
(Mac)
nodes.desc: Übersicht desktop widget on Max's Mac. Polls anderson-hub Fluxuum API for live pH/EC/flow per building. Transparent, glassy, resize+drag. Sibling to the Android widget.
nodes.tech: Übersicht · JSX · CSS · macOS
nodes.notes: 2026-06-02: Built. ~/Documents/GitHub/Flux_Widget_Mac/. 5 commits. Polls anderson-hub over Tailscale mesh. No git remote pushed yet.

nodes.label: Observatory
nodes.desc: Read-only analytical layer over the whole facility. Lake + scrapers feed predictive heads (k-NN, regression, XGBoost, LSTM) blended into per-cup inverse-MAE smart ensembles. Substrate + INPUT EC/pH forecasting, dose recommender, cross-room/cross-building comparison, MAE matrix, Facility 3D view. NEVER writes to facility systems. Dashboard deployed to anderson-hub /observatory (hub-backup mirror + HTTP healthcheck auto-recovery).
nodes.tech: Python · SQLite lake · scikit-learn · XGBoost · PyTorch LSTM · Flask dashboard · 859 tests · ~/Documents/GitHub/Observatory
nodes.notes: Phase 1 lake + 2A benchmark/gap + 2B chemistry + 2C predictive + 2D Kevin-prediction shipped 2026-06-09. Substrate modeling end-to-end 2026-06-10: per-(room,cup) intervention datasets, Solus (Aroya in-substrate) EC, held-out Gauntlet validation, smart ensemble beats baseline ~12% on EC. 2026-06-11: dashboard /runs passive diagnostic, /manual, preset INPUT targets (Days 14-42), Dose Recommender + recipe-bridge prefill, hub-backup full deploy. Targets fluid — input EC 3.5, pH 5.8-6.0 ideal, days 14-42 only. Read-only on recipe_book.db + Fluxuum API; AB7 + non-canonical rooms filtered at ingest. 2026-06-26: runoff scope widened to all 24 rooms (AM + PM, incl. AB7) so PM-room readings from the backfill pipeline reach the lake (branch pm-runoff-rooms).

nodes.label:
Observatory
Lake
nodes.desc: KGB-grade read-only data lake feeding Observatory + harvest-dossier. Ingest pipelines: recipe_changes, runoff_readings, fluxuum_readings (per-second, all zones), fluxuum_runs, anderson_snapshots, incident_report, ingredients. Pi store at /home/pi/observatory-lake/ holds runs.db — the permanent run archive (cron 5,35, never rolls, never deletes) so long crops survive the live feed's ~28-day rotation.
nodes.tech: SQLite · observe ingest CLI · launchd (Mac) + cron (Pi) · ~/.observatory/observatory.db + Pi runs.db · backed up to both Pis
nodes.notes: DELETE NOTHING — runs + recipe-change scrape are the predictive backbone; old data archived by harvest×room, never removed. AB7 lake scrub (2026-06-15, 29 phantom-runoff records) was a Max-authorized standing exception, synced to hub-backup. Lake floors: runs 2026-05-19 (Pi rebuild), runoff 2026-04-24. 2026-06-26: scope widened to 24 rooms so PM-room runoff can land; the PM backfill's lake push is HELD until Max says go.

nodes.label:
Harvest
Dossier
nodes.desc: When a flower room is marked harvested in CannaMax, captures that crop's ENTIRE cycle as one JSON dossier — runs (Fluxuum irrigation log) and runoff (Recipe Book root-zone EC/pH/Solus/VWC) kept analytically SEPARATE. Windows every record to [plant_in, harvest] so no prior crop bleeds in, and stamps day_of_cycle_calc (Day 0 = load day) on each record. Read-only on every facility source; writes only to the dossier store.
nodes.tech: Python · SQLite · Fluxuum /api/runs UNION runs.db archive (live wins on overlap) · cron 5,35 · fire-and-forget from CannaMax mark-harvested (passes load date explicitly) · GitHub TheMaxLong/harvest-dossier · deployed anderson-hub
nodes.notes: 2026-06-14/15: shipped + deployed Mac→GitHub→Pi (byte-identical verified). build_dossier.py → /home/pi/harvest-dossier/; archive_runs.py → /home/pi/observatory-lake/; dossiers → /home/pi/harvest-dossiers/ (symlinked into Observatory web root). Crops loaded on/after 2026-05-22 (shift S1) capture a complete cycle; earlier or shift-S2 rooms partial by design. Backfill of past harvests declined — prioritize clean forward capture.

nodes.label:
Harvest
Archive
nodes.desc: Operator viewer for harvest dossiers. Index (filter/sort by building/shift/date/status) → drill-in detail: per-metric tabs (pH/EC/VWC/Solus/Environment), an All / full-scope view (deviation heatmap + small multiples on a shared day-of-cycle axis + a Normalize %-of-target overlay for divergence-spotting), ≤3-room Compare, collapsible run-log, raw-records table. Runs & runoff kept distinct, S1/S2/S3 shown equally (never ranked), tooltips on every point. Live in the Observatory web root on anderson-hub.
nodes.tech: Claude Design standalone (Observatory design system) · Chart.js · self-contained HTML, reads ./dossiers/ via symlink · served by nginx on anderson-hub · harvest-archive.html (primary) + harvest-archive-v2.html
nodes.notes: 2026-06-18: Claude Design viewer LIVE — /observatory/harvest-archive.html (primary, repointed from the old single-file v1 which is backed up on Pi) + harvest-archive-v2.html. Division of labor: Claude Design owns the LOOK (their file, never edited by code); Claude Code wires/deploys/verifies. Round-trips this session: raw-records table export bug reported→fixed; collapsible run-log (1 row/cycle-day, click to expand). Normalize overlay is a DUMB VISUAL — correlation math stays in Observatory (/api/analysis/ec-ph-correlation). Pipeline verified end-to-end: CannaMax mark-harvested → build_dossier.py → manifest → viewer; fires on Monday harvests.

nodes.label:
Broken-Pump
Reconcile
nodes.desc: Phase-1 detector inside FacilityCheck. When a dosing pump dies and the ingredient is moved to a working port, it traces the displaced ingredient to its new live port, flags stale dead-port doses still in the active recipe, and reports. Recipe-anchored (ignores pumps not in the recipe), convention-first matcher (Drip+letter resolves with no alias), ambiguity flags rather than guesses. Read-only — zero recipe writes in Phase 1.
nodes.tech: Python · recipe_drift.broken_pump (classify/resolve/detect/report/notify/state) · reuses name_normalize · ntfy via urllib · 70 tests
nodes.notes: 2026-06-25: built TDD, merged to main (origin/main e39a199), armed into FacilityCheck (~/.zshrc). Pushes to the recipe tripwire topic ONLY when the drift set changes (signature dedup — no 15-min spam). First live run: 5 MIGRATE (AB Drip B 5→16, AB Balance 1→12, EF Drip B 19→20, GH Balance 3→13, GH Drip B 4→6) + 1 RETIRE flag (AB Athena Balance #2). deep-verify-eyes PASS — zero recipe_book.db writes. Phase 2 (auto-fix writes) not yet enabled.

nodes.label:
FacilityCheck
Sweep
nodes.desc: 5-step facility sweep on the Mac (recipe-defs scrape, irrigation audit, recipe-drift ingest, Pi sync, hardware scrape) plus the broken-pump detector. Runs via launchd (~15 min) or on-demand when a phone publishes to the trigger topic. Result digest — changes / flagged-for-review, 7-day forecast (harvests + phase changes), broken-pump — is pushed back to the recipe tripwire topic.
nodes.tech: zsh FacilityCheck() (~/.zshrc) · facility-check-listener.sh (launchd) · facility-digest.py · ntfy (trigger: hark-facility-check-… / result: recipe tripwire)
nodes.notes: 2026-06-25: wired the Pixel-10 Termux 'FacilityCheck' button (was a no-op — the shortcut backgrounded its curl and Termux:Widget reaped it before it sent; now publishes synchronously). Listener now pushes a section-accurate result digest to the recipe tripwire topic, forwarding FacilityCheck's own section titles + forecast dates verbatim (fixed an early 'HARVEST TODAY' mislabel of 7-day-forecast data). 2026-06-25: phone button now triggers FacilityCheckPeek (READ-ONLY) — scrapes the controllers and shows the week's changes (program progressions, doses, hardware) but saves/ingests/syncs NOTHING, so it never consumes the Mac's diff baseline. The Mac's full FacilityCheck stays the single authoritative audit that captures + journals. Verified: peek wrote nothing (hash-identical before/after).

nodes.label:
Recipe-Change
Tripwire
nodes.desc: Phones Max when a controller recipe changes (dose / name / port / EC / pH). Reads the recipe_changes table (Arc Chart's source) read-only and pushes a dedicated ntfy topic. anderson-hub only (hub-backup would double-ping). No Qwen in the path — deterministic copy only.
nodes.tech: Python on anderson-hub · cron 10,40 · recipe_changes table · ntfy gacx-recipe-tripwire-5d6cd9b5236c · Pacific times
nodes.notes: 2026-06-24: LIVE on anderson-hub. Fed by FacilityCheck's scraper; read-only (respects the Recipe-Book-protected rule). Shares its ntfy topic with the broken-pump detector — the facility tripwire channel.

nodes.label:
Facility Drift
Dashboard
nodes.desc: Real-time 24-room temp vs Recipe-Book phase target across AB/EF/GH (incl. AB7). ≥5°F = critical → immediate ntfy then a 30-min digest. Mac desktop widget plus a phone-shareable HTML dashboard.
nodes.tech: Übersicht widget (Mac) · facility-drift-poll.py on anderson-hub (cron/min) · /observatory/facility-drift.json (Funnel) · ntfy gacx-power-y2k7q9pmx3 (shared w/ facility-watch)
nodes.notes: 2026-06-20: LIVE. anderson-hub hosts the poller + JSON feed (anderson-hub-only). RH/CO2 alerts parked for later tuning.

nodes.label:
PM Runoff
Backfill
nodes.desc: Standalone clone of Flower-Room-Display that OCRs a FULL runoff log sheet (every dated row, not just today) and pushes all days through the existing CannaMax → Recipe Book → Observatory pipeline — to catch up the 12 PM rooms (AB5-8, EF5-8, GH1-4). Emits one text line per (room,day) carrying the sheet date as a // DATE token; the daily-AM app is never touched.
nodes.tech: React · Vite · TypeScript · Express · Anthropic SDK (Opus 4.8) · PostgreSQL · Drizzle · PDF input · nginx→node:8091
nodes.notes: 2026-06-26: shipped + deployed — clone LIVE at anderson-hub:3036 (nginx → node:8091), both Pis. Full-page prompt extracts every (room,day) row + emits // DATE; editable date in the review UI; PDF upload; AM/PM env; streaming. report_date = the row's sheet date, day_of_cycle = the sheet DAY (never recomputed — immune to stale PM cycle load_date). Steps 1/2/4 LIVE; step 3 (lake push) staged. 2026-06-29/30: OCR parser gained new-format autodetect + RULE B (position EC) + anomaly checker (6-30 flower law bands), kept byte-identical with the daily FRD service. Lake push HELD until Max says go. 2026-07-06: Veg log sheet added to the backfill OCR — full-page veg sheet → :3036. Adds AM/PM LEAF TEMP (veg-only editable leaf input; emits // LEAF + AM/PM + DATE); same 5 veg rooms + widened regex; ignores RACK / OH LIGHT % / HUMIDIFIER. Extraction-only. Deployed + verified both Pis (deep-verify-eyes PASS 2026-07-06); real filled-sheet extraction pending Max's test. 2026-07-09: mom rooms + ABV/ABV2 mirrored into the backfill on BOTH layers — the api-server VALID_ROOMS/regex AND the runoff-parser frontend (parse.ts room regex + isVegRoom for the bare AB bench), which had been silently dropping bare ABV + mom rows BEFORE the review UI. No deduplicateRooms added (backfill intentionally keeps every row). Built + deployed + deep-verify-eyes PASS both Pis (commit 4fecbd9).

nodes.label:
Drench
Library
nodes.desc: New 'Drench' tab in Recipe Book, laid out like Ingredients, for the foliars / teas / drenches / KNF ferments applied alongside the drip feed. Drench rows live in the ingredients table behind section='drench' so they never leak into the Ingredient grid, Arc Chart, doses, or drift detection, and reuse the existing detail modal.
nodes.tech: Python · Flask · SQLite (section column) · DRENCH_BACKFILL durable seed · shared detail modal
nodes.notes: 2026-06-30: SKELETON on isolated branch feat/drench-library — 9 shell tiles, /api/drenches route, startup idempotent backfill, self-heal hidden column. Excludes Ful-Power + Hygrozyme. Content build-out (B30 / Coco-Cat names, FFJ-split) pending research + facility details. NOT pushed / NOT deployed to either Pi. Durable seed = edit DRENCH_BACKFILL. Research drafts in docs/drench-research/.

nodes.label:
Facility Health
+ Security Scanner
nodes.desc: Self-contained DR-readiness + security-posture watchdog on both Pis. 12 checks every 30 min via systemd timer; plain-language ntfy alerts; silence = healthy.
nodes.tech: Python 3 stdlib · systemd timers · ntfy · urllib
nodes.notes: 2026-07-01: built + deployed BOTH Pis (deep-verify-eyes PASS 10/10). 12 checks */30 — failover armed, mirror fresh, weekly test-restore, cron/job success, neon offsite fresh, disk/SD health, detector roll-up, fail2ban, secrets-not-reinlined, SSH posture, listener audit, external-scan reminder. Red-green proven on the real path (forced CRIT → phone buzz → recovery). Caught + fixed an inline Postgres password left in neon_sync.py on its first run. Topic hark-facility-health-ae3f198eee31. Weekly test-restore Sun 03:00 PT on hub-backup into throwaway DBs (never touches live). repo main c3d508e. 2026-07-02: CI DN/DE auto-sync permission verified (sync-defaults bot pushes index.html).

nodes.label:
Alexandria ×
Fluxuum Bridge
nodes.desc: Multi-brand run-log product: any controller brand → Fluxuum's real run log via Alexandria adapters. The licensing play / North Star. SIMULATED-proven, production untouched.
nodes.tech: TypeScript · pnpm · Neon branches · Fluxuum patches · deep-verify
nodes.notes: 2026-07-02: Bricks #1/#2/#3 + graduation gate DONE+PROVEN (SIMULATED, deep-verify PASS). Brick #2 = brand-agnostic run log on Fluxuum's own GET /runs via adapter-declared run_key; Anderson byte-identical non-regression. Brick #3 = Wadsworth (BACnet) + Aranet (MQTT) env brands, honest empty metricMaps. Repo TheMaxLong/alexandria-fluxuum-bridge, PRs kept-unmerged-by-design. Autogrow live-probe CANCELLED (no hardware/API). Reactivates only for a real customer with real hardware.

nodes.label: BridgeMind
nodes.desc: Persistent task board + agent workspace for the commercial-bridge track (app.bridgemind.ai). BridgeSpace/BridgeVoice/BridgeShot desktop apps.
nodes.tech: MCP · app.bridgemind.ai
nodes.notes: 2026-07-02: adopted as the durable project board for Alexandria × Fluxuum — survives sessions so the track never goes dormant. BridgeVoice = daily dictation (replaced the retired VoxMax).

nodes.label:
Qwen3-VL-8B
(local OCR)
nodes.desc: Offline vision-LLM path for the runoff OCR — a cost + internet-outage resilience alternative to the Claude API. Runs on Max's 24GB MacBook Air via LM Studio (MLX). Promoted to primary only after the bake-off proves it holds accuracy on real sheets; otherwise stays an offline fallback. MiniCPM-V is the backup local model.
nodes.tech: Qwen3-VL-8B · MLX 4-bit · LM Studio (127.0.0.1:1234) · MiniCPM-V (backup) · Tailscale
nodes.notes: 2026-07-12: chosen after cost review found both OCRs on Opus 4.8 ($5/$25 per Mtok). Awaiting accuracy validation via the bake-off.

nodes.label:
OCR Model
Bake-off
nodes.desc: Offline harness that runs the SAME OCR prompt + each real sheet through Opus 4.8 / Sonnet / Haiku / Qwen3-VL / MiniCPM, scoring accuracy (stacked pen/Solus, circled voids, ambiguous digits, pipe-format fidelity) AND real $/sheet from token counts. Picks the cheapest model that holds Max's accuracy bar. Zero Pi contact.
nodes.tech: Node (zero-dep, raw fetch) · Anthropic Messages API · LM Studio OpenAI API · ~/Documents/ocr-model-bakeoff
nodes.notes: 2026-07-12: built + smoke-verified offline; awaits AB8/EF8/GH8 harvest sheets + local models downloaded in LM Studio.
